overall.description: A first-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with an elevator ride down to a plaza, then walking through a neon-lit urban district at night. The character moves from an enclosed elevator through an open plaza with digital billboards and food vendors, then transitions to a covered walkway beneath an overpass lined with shops and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator interior with digital advertising screens

events.description: elevator doors open revealing outdoor plaza at night

agents.ego_description: standing in descending elevator watching digital screens displaying news and advertisements

entered.detail: four large digital screens displaying news broadcasts and advertisements with yellow borders
vertical panel with D5 LOWER LEVEL text and yellow downward arrows
metal mesh elevator doors that open at the end of the segment

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a descending elevator with metallic walls and four digital screens showing various advertisements. The elevator control panel indicates travel to D5 Lower Level. At approximately 5.5 seconds, the doors open to reveal the outdoor plaza beyond, marking the transition to the next segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with digital billboards and food vendors

events.description: steps out of elevator into open plaza with wet reflective pavement
turns slightly right while navigating around plaza benches and seating areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing by food vendors, benches, and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart near the stairs
pedestrian sitting on concrete bench using a device

entered.detail: large illuminated vertical billboard displaying Broseph Brewing Co advertisement
large mature trees with illuminated trunks and dense canopies
various vendor carts and stalls including one with colorful umbrella
modern concrete seating structures scattered throughout the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a spacious urban plaza at night with wet reflective pavement. A prominent Broseph Brewing Co billboard dominates the center view, while trees and food vendors line the walkways. The camera navigates around benches and pedestrians, passing a vendor cart before approaching the transition to a covered walkway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with shops

events.description: enters covered walkway beneath concrete overpass with neon-lit shop fronts
futuristic vehicle drives past on the adjacent street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk passing various shops and pedestrians under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white cap walking toward camera
futuristic white car driving along the street parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: concrete overpass ceiling with ribbed texture and support columns
modern curved glass structure with metal framework housing multiple levels
storefronts with illuminated neon signs and green glowing entrance markers
building signage for Health Wharf visible on the glass structure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, shielded from the open sky. To the right, a modern glass-enclosed building with the Health Wharf sign rises, while the left side features shop fronts with vibrant neon signage. The character continues walking along the concrete sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing futuristic vehicles driving on the adjacent street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile confinement of a descending elevator into a sprawling, neon-lit urban district at night. It begins within the metallic walls of an elevator surrounded by digital advertisements, moving downward until the doors slide open to reveal a wide outdoor plaza. As the camera exits into the open air, the environment shifts to wet, reflective pavement dominated by a massive Broseph Brewing Co billboard and lined with food vendors and pedestrians. The scene then transitions from the open plaza to a sheltered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the sky is replaced by the glow of vibrant neon shop fronts and the glass facade of the Health Wharf building. Finally, the camera continues along the concrete sidewalk, passing futuristic vehicles and city dwellers in the heart of the bustling district.
